title: What airports will be like in 35-40 years - Request

transcript.text: Hello, video requests, video requests. I wake up and I do my video requests.

And it'll be programmed, ooh, it'll be programmed into the ship so that if you wanted to, you won't even be able to, um, to, you know, veer from a course.
Um, oh no, no, no, no, they'll, they'll, they'll be programmed to avoid each other.
